channel.title: AIツール分析 — 最新アップデート
channel.description: 生成AI・AIエージェントの最新アップデートを随時配信。新機能・料金変更・連携情報など。

item.title: GitHub: Self-service credential revocation for incident response
item.description: For a timely response to security incidents involving compromised accounts or stolen credentials, GitHub Enterprise owners can now use new “break-glass” capabilities to instantly revoke all credentials for a given… The post Self-service credential revocation for incident response a

item.title: GitHub: Changes to model selection for Free and Student plans
item.description: Copilot Free and Student plans will now use Copilot auto model selection as the default and only model selection experience. Auto dynamically selects the best model for each task, removing… The post Changes to model selection for Free and Student plans appeared first on The GitHub Blog.

item.title: OpenAI: OpenAI and Broadcom unveil LLM-optimized inference chip
item.description: OpenAI and Broadcom introduce Jalapeño, a custom AI chip built for LLM inference to improve performance, efficiency, and scale across AI systems.

item.title: GitHub: Secret scanning adds extended metadata for Replicate secrets
item.description: Secret scanning now includes extended metadata for Replicate secrets, providing richer context for leaked credentials. Extended metadata support This pattern now includes extended metadata when detected, providing richer context about… The post Secret scanning adds extended metadata for Replic

item.title: GitHub: Fetch Code Quality findings via REST API
item.description: Repository-level REST APIs for Code Quality findings are now available in public preview, bringing API support closer to the functionality already available in the GitHub UI. Two new read-only endpoints… The post Fetch Code Quality findings via REST API appeared first on The GitHub Blog.

item.title: OpenAI: How GPT-5 helped immunologist Derya Unutmaz solve a 3-year-old mystery
item.description: GPT-5 Pro helped solve a 3-year-old immunology mystery, offering insights into T cell behavior. The breakthrough could support cancer and autoimmune research.

item.title: GitHub: Automatic Dependabot access to GitHub-hosted registries
item.description: Dependabot can now read from private GitHub Packages registries without a personal access token. If a package has granted your repository access through “Manage Actions access” in the package settings,… The post Automatic Dependabot access to GitHub-hosted registries appeared first

item.title: OpenAI: Helping build shared standards for advanced AI
item.description: OpenAI helps build shared standards for advanced AI, supporting evaluation frameworks, safety practices, and global cooperation through the Appia Foundation.

item.title: OpenAI: How Omio is building the future of conversational travel
item.description: Discover how Omio uses OpenAI to power conversational travel experiences, accelerate product development, and transform into an AI-native company.

item.title: OpenAI: Daybreak: Tools for securing every organization in the world
item.description: OpenAI introduces new Daybreak tools, including Codex Security and GPT-5.5-Cyber, to help organizations find, validate, and patch vulnerabilities at scale.
